name: Paul Goldschmidt
transactions: June 6, 2006:Drafted by theLos Angeles Dodgersin the49th roundof the 2006 amateur draft, but did not sign.
June 9, 2009:Drafted by theArizona Diamondbacksin the8th roundof the 2009 amateur draft. Player signed June 14, 2009.
December 5, 2018:Traded by theArizona Diamondbacksto theSt. Louis CardinalsforCarson Kelly,Luke Weaver,Andrew Youngand 2019 competitive balance round B pick.
December 30, 2024:Signed as a Free Agent with theNew York Yankees.
February 12, 2026:Signed as a Free Agent with theNew York Yankees.
